keeper_skipping_turn_rate_5m.metric_value_semantics: matching log lines in the window; zero satisfies a zero-rate gate

source.command: curl -sS -m 5 -H 'Authorization: Bearer <local-token>' http://127.0.0.1:8935/metrics -o <TEMP_DIR>/goal-loop-live-metrics.prom && python3 scripts/goal_loop_log_window_metric.py <MASC_BASE_PATH>/.masc/logs/system_log_2026-05-06.jsonl --metric-name keeper_skipping_turn_rate_5m --pattern 'skipping turn.*semaphore wait' --window-start 2026-05-06T15:53:05Z --window-end 2026-05-06T15:58:05Z --display-path '<MASC_BASE_PATH>/.masc/logs/system_log_2026-05-06.jsonl' --pretty && python3 scripts/goal_loop_metrics_snapshot.py <TEMP_DIR>/goal-loop-live-metrics.prom --set keeper_skipping_turn_rate_5m=0 --set recovery_strategy_executed_total_1h=0 --pretty

manual_overrides.keeper_skipping_turn_rate_5m: 0, derived from the redacted 5-minute log-window metric report with zero matching semaphore-wait skip lines
manual_overrides.recovery_strategy_executed_total_1h: 0, derived from the redacted log-contract report where recovery_strategy_executed is required_missing
